summary: Minor price variance within vendor tolerance band. PO-2025-2009 locked prices under the 2024 contract. Invoice RE-2025-TG-4501 reflects a 2.1% raw material surcharge per updated vendor contract VC-2025-TG-001 (now countersigned). Variances: TP-C210 +2.67%, TP-B445 +1.36%, TP-S119 -1.36% — all within the 5% auto-approval tolerance threshold agreed in the master supply agreement. GRN-2009-A confirms full quantity receipt. Invoice auto-approved. Finance notified of updated contract unit prices for future PO issuance.

exceptions.description: All line items within 5% tolerance band per MSA clause 7.3. Variance driven by countersigned raw material surcharge (VC-2025-TG-001).
exceptions.resolution: Auto-approved. Update PO template prices for future orders.

agent_insights: Contract VC-2025-TG-001 now countersigned — variance within tolerance
Max variance 2.67% on TP-C210 — below 5% auto-approval threshold
Procurement notified to update PO unit prices for next order cycle
